name: Build Full-Stack Todo App
description: Create a complete full-stack todo application with backend API, frontend UI, and persistent storage

steps.title: Design application architecture
steps.description: Design the overall application architecture including data models, API endpoints, component hierarchy, and state management approach. Choose appropriate technologies.
steps.expected_output: Architecture document with ER diagram, API spec, component tree, and technology choices

steps.title: Create backend API
steps.description: Implement a RESTful API with endpoints for CRUD operations on todos: create, read (list/single), update, delete. Include input validation and proper error handling.
steps.expected_output: Working backend API with all CRUD endpoints, validation, and error responses

steps.title: Create frontend UI
steps.description: Build a responsive frontend with todo list view, add form, edit capability, delete confirmation, and status toggling. Include loading states and error handling.
steps.expected_output: Complete frontend UI with all CRUD interactions, responsive design, and polished UX

steps.title: Add persistence layer
steps.description: Integrate a database for persistent storage. Set up migrations, connection pooling, and ensure data integrity with proper constraints.
steps.expected_output: Database integration with migrations, models, and verified data persistence

steps.title: Write tests
steps.description: Write comprehensive tests including unit tests for business logic, integration tests for API endpoints, and end-to-end tests for critical user flows.
steps.expected_output: Test suite with unit, integration, and e2e tests achieving >80% code coverage

steps.title: Write documentation
steps.description: Create complete project documentation including README with setup instructions, API documentation, deployment guide, and contributing guidelines.
steps.expected_output: Full documentation set with README, API docs, and deployment instructions
